override_reason: Maintainer authorized PASS-branch flip pre-CI-smoke (see commit message for T171 / T195b). Per `cursor-fixture-decision.contract.md:27-31`, the PASS-branch shape entails: (1) `.cursor-plugin/plugin.json` declares `agents`, (2) full 13-specialist Cursor sub-agent generation, (3) spec A-005 outcome 'spike passed', (4) release notes state 'Cursor sub-agent generation shipped'.
_note: T170a (commit 25, OOS-005) — outcome flipped from `pending` to `passed` under maintainer authority. The PASS-branch deltas required by `cursor-fixture-decision.contract.md:27-31` are applied in the same commit set (T171 + T195b).
